react-i18next:: It seems you are still using the old wait option, you may migrate to the new useSuspense behaviour.

🥺 Seems like you're trying to call `fedopsLogger.appLoadStarted` and `fedopsLogger.appLoaded` in your controller.
We are already logging load events for SSR and CSR environments, so you can remove these calls from your project.
